hero.title: Domki u Elizy
hero.description: Discover an unforgettable getaway in our luxury cottages located in the picturesque Tatra region. The perfect place for a romantic weekend, family vacation, or meeting with friends.

cottages.title: Our Cottages
cottages.subtitle: Comfort and luxury in Tatra style
cottages.description: Each of our cottages has been designed with attention to the smallest details, combining traditional Tatra style with modern comfort.

location.title: Location
location.subtitle: Heart of the Tatras at your fingertips
location.description: Our cottages are located in a picturesque area, just a few minutes from the most important attractions of the region.

virtualTour.title: 360° Walkthrough
virtualTour.subtitle: Immerse yourself in the cottages before you arrive

booking.title: Booking
booking.subtitle: Reserve your stay
booking.description: Check availability and book your dream vacation in the Tatras.
